name: Santiago Aldana
summary: MIT Sloan MBA executive with 20+ years of strategic leadership in fintech, AI, payments, and digital transformation across Latin America and the U.S.

experience.title: Managing Partner
bullets: Secured an exclusive LATAM distribution agreement with Maven AGI (Agentic AI for Customer Experience), expanding reach through a network of regional distributors.
Implemented agentic AI CX platform that optimizes sales, marketing, and customer support, increasing efficiency and customer engagement.
Explored Agentic AI in lower risk scenarios to learn innovation alternatives that will emerge in regulated industries at the intersection of payments, blockchain, digital identity, and cybersecurity.
experience.accomplishment: Keep updated with Agentic AI, learning what can be valuable for financial services/payments.

experience.company: SoyYo (Digital Identity and fraud prevention platform owned by the 3 main banks)
experience.title: CEO
bullets: Created and scaled a user-centric digital identity platform adopted by 3M+ users, delivering onboarding, KYC, biometrics, authentication, and cybersecurity services; negotiated its successful sale to Redeban, Colombia's leading payment processor.
Forged strategic alliances with Mastercard, Lexis Nexis, Experian, Thales, and TransUnion, positioning SoyYo as a trusted ecosystem for digital identity and fraud prevention.

Directed cross-bank collaboration among Colombia's top 3 financial institutions, aligning stakeholders on AI-driven biometrics, authentication, consent management, and fraud prevention initiatives in highly regulated financial products and compliance-conscious business processes.
Built a high-performing digital business team from scratch, achieving an employee NPS of 9.1 and fostering a culture of innovation and execution.
experience.accomplishment: Startup Growth & Exit: Launched SoyYo APIfied identity platform to improve payments experience and onboarding processes. Led to successful exit via acquisition by Colombia's leading PSP, after growth to 3M+ user identities.

experience.title: Chief Digital & Technology Officer
bullets: Directed a $110M IT budget, delivering a company-wide digital transformation that enabled omnichannel customer knowledge and personalization.
Grew online sales by 15% YoY, generating $700–800M annually and representing 47% of Avianca's sales growth.
Enabled Amazon partnership, positioning Avianca Cargo as LatAm's primary distribution partner.
Improved digital NPS by 12+ points by redesigning customer touchpoints through digital channels.

Embedded analytics, data, and innovation into core operations, enabling faster decision-making, leaner processes, and business transformation through design thinking, agile cells, and lean startup methodologies.
experience.accomplishment: Performed airline-wide digital transformation including digital channels, flight/land operations, finance, analytics. In digital channels alone, achieved 47% of total sales growth, increased NPS by 12 points, and an increase in 10pp through better payments experience.

experience.company: IQ Outsourcing (BPO and IT services to banking, telecom, and insurance sectors)
experience.title: CEO
bullets: Transformed the business from a traditional BPO into a digital solutions provider for banking, health, and telecom sectors.
Reduced HR cost-to-revenue ratio by 21 percentage points through AI, automation and IT-driven efficiency.
Launched new digital products for banking and health industries, enhancing customer knowledge and engagement.
Pioneered the adoption of Blockchain, AI, mobile, DevOps, and cloud technologies, driving innovation and competitiveness.
experience.accomplishment: Improved conversion rate for new credit card issuing by performing digital transformation of processes at retail, incorporating AI.

experience.title: CEO & Founding Partner
bullets: Founded and launched LATAM's first Mobile Virtual-Network Operator, expanding financial inclusion through mobile tools, education, and digital channels.
Scaled to 400K customers in the first year, demonstrating rapid market adoption.
Partnered with Grupo Ardila Lülle and later negotiated the sale of 70% of the company to Bancolombia at an $18M valuation.
Advised Bancolombia Group ventures on mobile, digital, and fintech innovation, driving cultural and customer experience transformation.
experience.accomplishment: Pioneering Fintech – Founded and scaled Uff Movil, LatAm's first Mobile Virtual-Network Operator, reaching 400K customers in the first year, valued at $18M, acquired by Bancolombia.

experience.title: CIO & Director Customer Loyalty
bullets: Delivered a €60M IT transformation program across 5 countries in just 17 months (vs. a 4-year plan), modernizing operations and enabling rapid product launches.
Enabled 100%+ annual sales growth by improving provisioning and expanding new product offerings.
Led the operational and technological merger of 40 business units, positioning the company for acquisition by Telefónica.
Directed a team of 500+ professionals across multiple countries, improving customer retention and sales conversion by 5+ percentage points through broadband and TV strategies.
experience.accomplishment: Technology at Scale – Led Telefónica's $60M+ IT transformation across 5 countries in 17 months (vs. 4-year plan).

previous_experience.title: CFO
previous_experience.summary: Led digital transformation through SAP implementation, managed as Board Member a digital certificate subsidiary, and introduced a risk-based model for a COP 70B investment portfolio.

previous_experience.title: Marketing & Sales Manager
previous_experience.summary: Launched Mastercard and Visa credit cards in Colombia, cut onboarding time from two weeks to one day, and developed the "Citigold" high-value customer segment.

board.summary: Advising a cross-border payments platform using crypto and stablecoins; coaching founders to reach product-market fit.
Guided Colombia's largest card issuer (bank + retailer JV) to industry leadership in open banking and embedded finance.
Led regulatory efforts to promote open finance, instant payments, and financial inclusion for unbanked populations.

education.degree: MBA - Management of Technology, Emphasis on Strategy, Innovation, and Technology
Bachelor's in Industrial Engineering, Thesis: Credit Score Model for Diners Club Credit Card

additional.languages: Fully bilingual in Spanish and English
